content:
Hi @Andreas Hindborg ,
Quick update — I've rebased rnull to the final v7.0 release:
Rebase rc3→rc7→v7.0 was conflict-free. I also tested with rustc 1.94.1 (CLIPPY=1) and needed 3 small fixes in rnull-scoped code (amended into the existing resolve build errors commit):

  1. rust/kernel/alloc/kbox.rs — match/Err(_) return pattern → .map_err(|e| e.into())? (clippy question_mark)
  2. rust/kernel/block/mq/request.rs (2 sites) — &expr as *const T → core::ptr::from_ref(expr) (clippy reference_as_raw_pointer)

Branch: https://github.com/Engineer-HaMa/linux/tree/rnull-v7.0

Disclaimer: This rebase was performed entirely by my AI agent. I only verified that it builds and the basic workload pass — I have not personally reviewed the full commit-by-commit diff against the original. Aside from the clippy fixes above, it shouldn't carry any meaningful changes, but please treat it as such.

Are you planning to share your own v7.0 rebase of rnull? Would love to cross-check against your canonical version.

Hi SeungJong! I am planning to rebase rnull and all the dependencies on v7.0 in concert with sending updated versions of all the series. It is probably going to be a few weeks before I get through all of it. There are so many patches...

Thanks for the update, Andreas! No rush at all — I understand the scope with all the dependent series.
While waiting for your v7.0, I'll likely keep rebasing on top of the v7.1-rc releases as they come out.
Good luck wrapping up the series!
